data.title: CTO Realty Growth to release Q3 2025 earnings on Oct 28 after market closes, conference call on Oct 29 at 9AM ET.
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, on September 24, 2025, CTO Realty Growth disclosed that it will release its financial and operational outcomes for Q3 2025 post-market closure on Tuesday, October 28, 2025. Subsequently, a conference call has been set for Wednesday, October 29, 2025, at 9:00 AM Eastern Time to deliberate on these outcomes. CTO Realty Growth, listed on NYSE as CTO, is preparing to share crucial figures and insights with stakeholders during this upcoming event.

data.title: Stitch Fix stock soars post-Q4 earnings beat. Reported loss of 7 cents/share, revenue $311.22M (above est.), and 2026 guidance surpassed expectations.
data.description: Stitch Fix, Inc. saw its shares (NASDAQ: SFIX) rise following the release of strong fourth-quarter results after the market closed on Wednesday. The company also provided fiscal 2026 guidance that surpassed expectations. In the quarter, the company reported a loss of seven cents per share, outperforming the projected loss of 10 cents. Revenue for the quarter reached $311.22 million, exceeding the estimated $305.83 million. For further information, visit the full story on Benzinga.com. Keep track of SFIX stock's movement with real-time updates on its price.

data.title: Arcosa, provider of infrastructure products, dual lists on NYSE Texas, maintaining primary listing on NYSE. Ticker symbol remains "ACA".
data.description: Arcosa, Inc. (NYSE: ACA), a company specializing in infrastructure products and solutions, disclosed the dual listing of its common stock on NYSE Texas, a new fully electronic equities exchange based in Dallas, Texas. The company will keep its primary listing on the New York Stock Exchange with the ticker symbol "ACA", and will also be traded on NYSE Texas. "Texas has played a crucial role in our company's development and achievements," mentioned Antonio Carrillo, the leader at Arcosa, Inc.

data.title: DBX 4 in Nashville features Gable Steveson vs. Billy Swanson main event. Limited tickets for Jon Jones fan experience.
data.description: Gold medalist in Olympic wrestling, Gable Steveson, is set to launch his professional boxing career with DBX. Limited tickets are on sale for the inaugural Jon Jones DBX Meet & Greet event in Nashville on Sept. 24, 2025. This announcement comes as DBX aims to revolutionize combat sports landscape.

data.title: InfoTrack and Filevine launch integration for speedy eFiling, serving. Docs processed in <1min with 99%+ accuracy.
data.description: Today in New York, on September 24, 2025, InfoTrack, a prominent litigation technology provider, unveiled a new integration feature for users of the Filevine AI-powered practice management software. This new feature allows users to file and serve documents in less than a minute with over 99% accuracy. This development aims to significantly streamline the document filing process for legal professionals using these platforms.

data.title: SmartStop completes CAD $200 million Canadian Maple Bond offering in Ladera Ranch, California.
data.description: LADERA RANCH, CA - SmartStop recently completed a Canadian Maple Bond Offering, raising a total of CAD $200 million from investors.

data.title: Cidara Therapeutics stock hits 7-yr high after up 173% with plans to expand testing for non-vaccine flu drug.
data.description: Cidara Therapeutics experienced a significant increase in its stock shares, reaching a peak not seen in seven years on Wednesday. This surge was fueled by the company's announcement to broaden the testing of its non-vaccine flu prevention medication. The stock has already risen by 173% since the beginning of the year, marking a remarkable increase. This growth captured the interest of investors, propelling the company's stock to its highest point in seven years.
The US launches a Section 232 probe on imports of medical devices.

data.title: Raymond James Financial releases August 2025 operating data for investors; Limited correlation to earnings.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida on September 24, 2025, Raymond James Financial, Inc. (NYSE: RJF) released key operational figures for August 2025. The report aims to offer investors up-to-date insights into essential performance indicators. It is important to note that while this data provides valuable information, it may not consistently align with actual earnings.

data.title: SeaStar Medical's NEUTRALIZE-AKI trial continues with zero device-related safety issues, sample size adjusted for effectiveness.
data.description: An independent Data and Safety Monitoring Board (DSMB) has reported no safety issues related to the device used in the trial. The DSMB also expressed support for the potential clinical benefits of the device. In light of this positive finding, the trial sample size has been reassessed and increased to enhance statistical power.

Brazil’s President Lula Said There Is No Need For Conflict With The US And Highlighted Good Relations With Former President Trump. He Also Said Some Of Trump’s Past Decisions About Brazil Were Based On Wrong Information And Looks Forward To More Talks.

data.title: Alpine Income Property Trust to report Q3 2025 results on Oct 23 with a conference call on Oct 24 at 9:00 AM ET.
data.description: In Winter Park, Florida, on September 24, 2025, Alpine Income Property Trust, Inc. (NYSE: PINE) revealed plans to release its financial and operational outcomes for Q3 2025 post-market closure on Thursday, October 23, 2025. A conference call to deliberate on these results is slated for Friday, October 24, 2025, at 9:00 AM ET.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declares $0.34 per share dividend for Q3 2025, to be paid on Oct. 24.
data.description: Atlanta-based Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. disclosed today that its Board of Directors sanctioned a cash dividend of $0.34 for each common stock share for Q3 2025. Shareholders can anticipate receiving this dividend on October 24, 2025.

data.title: DuPont sets record date of Oct 22, 2025 for Qnity spin-off from Electronics business.
data.description: In Wilmington, Delaware, on September 24, 2025, DuPont (NYSE: DD) revealed that the board of directors has set October 22, 2025, as the record date for the distribution related to the planned spin-off of DuPont's Electronics business, Qnity.
Trump Says He Will Sign Executive Order This Week To Dismantle Domestic Terrorism Networks

data.title: KB Home (NYSE: KBH) reports strong Q3 2025 results, meeting financial guidance ranges, showing progress in reducing build times and costs.
data.description: In Los Angeles, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) announced its financial results for the third quarter ending on August 31, 2025. The company reported meeting or surpassing its projected ranges in essential business metrics, showing strong performance. Jeffrey Mezger, the Chairman and CEO, highlighted the successful execution and operational improvements that led to decreased build times and costs. The company's sales strategy in the quarter also contributed to their positive outcomes.

data.title: Christian author Daniel Boyer encourages believers to rise in God's authority amid spiritual warfare. - PRNewswire, Sept. 24, 2025
data.description: Daniel Boyer, in his recent book, emphasizes the importance of engaging in spiritual warfare and embracing repentance, while also advocating for walking in the power of the Holy Spirit. Discussing the prevalent belief that conflict permeates all aspects of society, Boyer highlights its presence in politics, nations, households, and religious institutions. He suggests that individuals need to actively participate in spiritual battles, with repentance and reliance on the Holy Spirit serving as essential components. Boyer's message of cultivating spiritual strength and awareness resonates strongly in the current environment.

data.title: Pickleman's partners with Brave Like McKenna Foundation in KC to raise awareness for pediatric cancer in September.
data.description: In September 2025, Pickleman's Gourmet Café in the Kansas City metropolitan area announced a collaboration with the Brave Like McKenna Foundation to support children and families fighting pediatric cancer. The foundation was created in honor of McKenna Royer, who passed away at the age of 11 due to Diffuse...

data.title: Dollar Tree to rebuild Marietta distribution center, 1 million sq. ft., after prior facility destroyed by tornado in April 2024.
data.description: In Chesapeake, Virginia, Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) commemorated the commencement of construction for a new one million square foot distribution center in Marietta, Oklahoma. This event signifies a crucial advancement for Dollar Tree as they reestablish operations in the area after their previous facility was destroyed by a tornado in April 2024. State and local officials, such as Governor Kevin Stitt and Senator James Lankford, joined Dollar Tree in this groundbreaking ceremony.

data.title: Cadence collaborates with TSMC to advance chip design & IP for AI, HPC; focusing on TSMC nodes & 3DFabric tech.
data.description: A significant development in chip design and IP has been revealed by Cadence in San Jose, California. This progress has been propelled by the enduring partnership with TSMC and is aimed at serving customers in the AI and HPC sectors. The announcement signifies important strides in enhancing technology solutions for these industries.
